issue_title: PR is hidden from column, when linked in issue in a different column
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the Bug

I have a PR that is in the inbox column, tagging an issue as `Closes #ISSUE_NR`. The issue is in a separate column, has the PR attached. The PR does not appear in the inbox column because of that, which is mis-leading:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ef840f
test_description_zh: 创建一个 PR 并在其中通过 'Closes #ISSUE_NR' 关联一个位于不同看板列的 issue。观察该 PR 是否仍然在其原本所属的看板列（如 inbox 列）中正常显示。
expected_result_zh: PR 应在其所属的看板列中正常可见，不会因为关联了处于其他列的 issue 而被隐藏。关联的 issue 和 PR 应分别在各自对应的列中独立显示。
